title: Where I’m From
full_title: Where I'm From by ¥ellow Bucks (Ft. Fabolous)
lyrics:
[Chorus: ¥ellow Bucks]
Where I'm from
何もないとこから来て今ここ
Take it to the top
Let's make it happen
That bitch still wanna fuck but I'm movin' movin' yeah
Hey siri 現在地を教えてくれオレ達に
Where we at, at, at, at
世界中へと出稼ぎ city to city, yeah

[Verse 1: ¥ellow Bucks]
Get the bullet train
名古屋から望みかけ Tokyo city へ
Get the airplane
羽田から飛ぶ向かう先は JFK
Yeah 食べてる鮨
やらないぜスリ
背中に墨
通そうか筋
Do it for my city
抹茶は宇治
Rappin' like a uzi
チャンスはくる急に
掴みとる winning
現金で膨らむ新作の AMIRI
黒髪美人
She from Japan
酒とオレに酔うあの子は大胆
あの頃夢見たばあちゃん家の畳の上
遥か遠くに感じてた New York の夜景
ルフィみたちに引き寄せる何かの縁
決めた道で稼いでく dollar とか yen
Make it rain

[Chorus: ¥ellow Bucks]
Where I'm from
何もないとこから来て今ここ
Take it to the top
Let's make it happen
That bitch still wanna fuck but I'm movin' movin' yeah
Hey siri 現在地を教えてくれオレ達に
Where we at, at, at, at
世界中へと出稼ぎ city to city, yeah

[Verse 2: Fabolous]
Non-stop to Tokyo but I be lowkey, bro
Guard bags, no tags if you know, you know
Catch me up in Baia on fire likе I’m Goku, though
Hibiki 21 smooth, 30 kinda smoky, though
Photoshoot fresh, like the camеraman in focus, though
Rari look like Pokémon, shorty saying, “Poke me,” though
Linking up with ¥ellow Bucks, laying down these vocals, ho
This that international, this is not a local flow
Yeah, I been broke before, but that ain’t never broke me, though
If we had smoke before, you know I had ’em choking, bro
Guys telling lies, I ain’t going for the okie-doke
That’ll make me bring the long nose like Pinocchio
Bro got the hammer, guess he Thor and I’m Loki, yo
They be out here throwing more shade than the Oakleys, yo
Where I’m from, you lucky if you make it to the Poconos
Now where we go, it’s like a dream stay woke, my bro

[Chorus: ¥ellow Bucks]
Where I'm from
何もないとこから来て今ここ
Take it to the top
Let's make it happen
That bitch still wanna fuck but I'm movin' movin' yeah
Hey siri 現在地を教えてくれオレ達に
Where we at, at, at, at
世界中へと出稼ぎ city to city, yeah
